name: Gatewatcher NDR
description: Multi-engine NDR platform combining static analysis, machine learning, and AI to detect known, unknown, and zero-day threats across network traffic

actions.name: Get Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve security alerts from Gatewatcher NDR platform

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date filter in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date filter in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity level (low, medium, high, critical)

parameters.name: risk_score_min
parameters.description: Minimum risk score to filter alerts

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific alert

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The alert ID

actions.name: Get Events
actions.description: Retrieve network events detected by Gatewatcher analysis engines

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date filter in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date filter in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: engine
parameters.description: Filter by detection engine (sigflow, malcore, dga, codebreaker)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: Get Malware Analysis
actions.description: Retrieve malware analysis results from Codebreaker engine

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the file to look up

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get DGA Detections
actions.description: Retrieve Domain Generation Algorithm detections from ML engine

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of detections to return

actions.name: Get GCenter Status
actions.description: Retrieve GCenter management appliance status and health information

actions.name: Run Retro Hunt
actions.description: Perform retroactive threat hunting across historical network data

parameters.name: indicator
parameters.description: IOC value to hunt for (IP, domain, hash, URL)

parameters.name: indicator_type
parameters.description: Type of indicator (ip, domain, md5, sha256, url)

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date for retro hunt period

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date for retro hunt period
